Comment rules: Use the correct Comment API – create a Comment, add a Run with the comment text to its first paragraph, then append the Comment to the target Paragraph.
Remove any non‑existent methods such as Comment.SetText.
Ensure the builder’s cursor is correctly positioned when inserting the text box and when adding the comment.
Saving/Export rules: Call Document.Save after finishing list formatting; printing can be performed later with Document.Print or a UI dialog.
Keep the protection and encryption steps separate – protect the document first, then encrypt on save using `OoxmlSaveOptions.Password`.
Images/Shapes/OLE rules: Keep only the namespaces that are actually used: System.Drawing, Aspose.Words, and Aspose.Words.Lists.
Layout rules: Add the missing namespace import for the Footnote class: `using Aspose.Words.Notes;`.
Iterate over the NodeCollection returned by `GetChildNodes` using `foreach (Footnote footnote in footnotes)`; the collection contains Footnote objects.
